content_body: Our stay with CROG was out of this world. The views were spectacular and only superseded by the quality of the cabin itself. It seemed as though it was brand new. The whole place was spotless and we couldn't want for a single thing while there. We had planned on spending more time out in the surrounding areas, but the cabin was so great we just spent basically the whole time there. Thanks so much for a wonderful vacation, CROG team!
title: Out of This World
